name: Brandy Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat the butter with an electric mixer until softened.
3. Gradually add the sugar, then the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add the corn syrup and brandy, mixing until combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell and sprinkle with pecans.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until set around the edges. The filling will be puffy.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
